ddls:
CREATE TABLE "domains" (
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each domain */,
  "domain_name" TEXT /* Name of the domain */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the domain belongs to */,
  "tld" TEXT /* Top-level domain (TLD) of the domain */,
  "registry_date" TEXT /* Date the domain was registered */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the domain expires */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the domain (e.g., active, inactive, pending) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the domain was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the domain was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("domain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_domains_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the domain the price belongs to */,
  "price_type" TEXT /* Type of price (e.g., new, transfer, renewal) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Price amount */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the price */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the price takes effect */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the price was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the price was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prices_domain_id FOREIGN KEY ("domain_id") REFERENCES domains ("domain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "registrations" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registration record */,
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the domain being registered */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer registering the domain */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the domain was registered */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the domain expires */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the registration (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the registration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the registration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_domain_id FOREIGN KEY ("domain_id") REFERENCES domains ("domain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transfers" (
  "transfer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transfer record */,
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the domain being transferred */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer transferring the domain */,
  "transfer_date" TEXT /* Date the domain was transferred */,
  "transfer_status" TEXT /* Status of the transfer (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transfer was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transfer was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transfer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_domain_id FOREIGN KEY ("domain_id") REFERENCES domains ("domain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "renewals" (
  "renewal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each renewal record */,
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the domain being renewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer renewing the domain */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date the domain was renewed */,
  "renewal_status" TEXT /* Status of the renewal (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the renewal was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the renewal was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("renewal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_renewals_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_renewals_domain_id FOREIGN KEY ("domain_id") REFERENCES domains ("domain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment record */,
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the domain being paid for */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer making the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the payment */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment method used */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_payment_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method_id") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_domain_id FOREIGN KEY ("domain_id") REFERENCES domains ("domain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "payment_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the payment method */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment method was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment method was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, support, customer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission record */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role that the permission belongs to */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the role (e.g., view domains, manage payments) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification record */,
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the domain related to the notification */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer receiving the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., renewal reminder, expiration notice, payment confirmation) */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_domain_id FOREIGN KEY ("domain_id") REFERENCES domains ("domain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion record */,
  "promotion_name" TEXT /* Name of the promotion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the promotion */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount amount offered by the promotion */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the promotion was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the promotion was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id")
)
